name: create_gameobject
description: Create a new GameObject in the current scene. Optionally create it from a primitive type (Cube, Sphere, Capsule, Cylinder, Plane, Quad). You can set its position, rotation (euler angles), scale, and an optional parent.

primitive_type.description: Optional primitive type. Use 'None' or omit for an empty GameObject.

rotation_x.description: Euler rotation X in degrees. Default 0.

rotation_y.description: Euler rotation Y in degrees. Default 0.

rotation_z.description: Euler rotation Z in degrees. Default 0.

parent.description: Optional name of an existing GameObject to set as the parent.
